daily.today_energy: Your intuitive radar is buzzing today, Pisces. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your superpower right now. The vibe is introspective but hopeful, like you're finally seeing things clearly.
daily.love: Someone might be trying to get your attention in subtle ways. Stay open to unexpected connections, whether romantic or deeply platonic. Your empathy is magnetic rn.
daily.career: Creative ideas are flowing, and this is your moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on. Your unique perspective is exactly what's needed—own it without overthinking.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentler movement today. Yoga, stretching, or a slow walk hits different. Hydrate extra and give yourself permission to rest without guilt.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, Pisces, and you're picking up on energy shifts others are missing. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your superpower rn. Creative ideas are flowing, so maybe journal or make something to process all this cosmic tea.
weekly.love: Your emotional radar is turned all the way up, which means you're craving real connection over surface-level convos. If you're vibing with someone, be honest about what you actually want. Single? Pay attention to who's making genuine effort to know you better.
weekly.career: This is giving 'time to stop playing small' energy. You've got ideas that deserve space, so speak up in meetings or start that project you've been daydreaming about. Your intuition about work situations is basically undefeated this week—lean into it.
weekly.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit overstimulated with everything happening. Grounding practices like walks, salt baths, or just being near water will reset your vibe. Listen to what your body's asking for instead of pushing through.
